title: S-538 10 Tiers Black Adjustable Shoe Storage Tall Shoe Rack Organiser Shelf Hold Stand for 30 Pairs Shoe, 56 x 30 x 170cm, Sturdy Design, Space Saving
features: Introducing our upgraded shoe rack, featuring a strong and sturdy design with our new 2023 upgrade. Our 16mm thickened electrophoresis pipes are 30% thicker than similar products on the market, providing not only a stronger constriction but also a more elegant visual appearance.

Measuring approximately 56 x 30 x 170 CM, this shoe rack can hold up to 20 pairs of shoes for gentlemen or 30 pairs for ladies and children. Its modern design makes it suitable for any decoration style, seamlessly blending in with your existing home decor.

We have also designed an extra 12cm footer height, offering you additional storage space underneath the bottom of the shoe rack. Store more pieces and keep your space organized without compromising on style.

Despite its sturdy construction, this shoe rack is lightweight, making it easy to move around and clean. Assembly is a breeze and can be completed within 10 minutes, allowing you to enjoy the convenience of our shoe rack in no time. It's a DIY project that you can confidently handle on your own.
Upgrade your shoe organization with our strong, stylish, and easy-to-assemble shoe rack. Order now and experience the difference it can make to your home.
